name="twitter:image" content="https://v5.ai-sdk.dev/og/docs?title=Migrate%20AI%20SDK%205.x%20to%206.0&amp;description=Learn%20how%20to%20upgrade%20AI%20SDK%205.x%20to%206.0."/><script>
// Protect Geist code blocks from 1Password DOM flattening
(function() {
  const codeBlockSnapshots = new WeakMap();
  let isRestoring = false;

  function saveSnapshot(codeElement) {
    if (!codeBlockSnapshots.has(codeElement)) {
      codeBlockSnapshots.set(codeElement, codeElement.cloneNode(true));
    }
  }

  function checkAndRestore(codeElement) {
    if (isRestoring) return;

    // Check if our specific structure was flattened
    const hasOurStructure = codeElement.querySelector('[data-geist-code-block-line]');
    const snapshot = codeBlockSnapshots.get(codeElement);

    if (!hasOurStructure && snapshot && snapshot.querySelector('[data-geist-code-block-line]')) {
      // Our structure was destroyed (likely by 1Password), restore it
      isRestoring = true;
      codeElement.innerHTML = snapshot.innerHTML;
      isRestoring = false;
    }
  }

  function initializeCodeBlocks() {
    document.querySelectorAll('code[data-geist-code-block]').forEach(saveSnapshot);
  }

  // Single global observer for all code blocks
  const globalObserver = new MutationObserver(function(mutations) {
    if (isRestoring) return;

    mutations.forEach(function(mutation) {
      // Check if new code blocks were added
      mutation.addedNodes.forEach(function(node) {
        if (node.nodeType === 1) {
          if (node.matches && node.matches('code[data-geist-code-block]')) {
            saveSnapshot(node);
          } else if (node.querySelectorAll) {
            node.querySelectorAll('code[data-geist-code-block]').forEach(saveSnapshot);
          }
        }
      });

      // Check if existing code blocks were modified
      var target = mutation.target;
      if (target.nodeType === 1) {
        // Check if the target itself is a protected code block
        if (target.matches && target.matches('code[data-geist-code-block]')) {
          checkAndRestore(target);
        }
        // Check if the target contains protected code blocks
        else if (target.closest && target.closest('code[data-geist-code-block]')) {
          checkAndRestore(target.closest('code[data-geist-code-block]'));
        }
      }
    });
  });

  // Initialize existing code blocks and start observing
  function init() {
    initializeCodeBlocks();
    globalObserver.observe(document.documentElement, {
      childList: true,
      subtree: true,
      characterData: true
    });
  }

  // Run immediately and after DOM is ready
  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init);
  } else {
    init();
  }
})();

markdown</span></div></span></button></div></div><h1 id="migrate-ai-sdk-5x-to-60" data-docs-heading=""><a href="#migrate-ai-sdk-5x-to-60">Migrate AI SDK 5.x to 6.0<span><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" height="0.7em" width="0.7em">
  <g stroke-width="1.2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor">
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M8.995,7.005 L8.995,7.005c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975l-1.99,1.99c-1.374,1.374-3.601,1.374-4.975,0l0,0c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975 l1.748-1.698"></path>
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M7.005,8.995 L7.005,8.995c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975l1.99-1.99c1.374-1.374,3.601-1.374,4.975,0l0,0c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975 l-1.748,1.698"></path>
  </g>
</svg></span></a></h1>
<h2 id="recommended-migration-process" data-docs-heading=""><a href="#recommended-migration-process">Recommended Migration Process<span><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" height="0.7em" width="0.7em">
  <g stroke-width="1.2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor">
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M8.995,7.005 L8.995,7.005c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975l-1.99,1.99c-1.374,1.374-3.601,1.374-4.975,0l0,0c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975 l1.748-1.698"></path>
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M7.005,8.995 L7.005,8.995c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975l1.99-1.99c1.374-1.374,3.601-1.374,4.975,0l0,0c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975 l-1.748,1.698"></path>
  </g>
</svg></span></a></h2>
<ol>
<li>Backup your project. If you use a versioning control system, make sure all previous versions are committed.</li>
<li>Upgrade to AI SDK 6.0.</li>
<li>Follow the breaking changes guide below.</li>
<li>Verify your project is working as expected.</li>
<li>Commit your changes.</li>
</ol>
<h2 id="ai-sdk-60-package-versions" data-docs-heading=""><a href="#ai-sdk-60-package-versions">AI SDK 6.0 Package Versions<span><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" height="0.7em" width="0.7em">
  <g stroke-width="1.2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor">
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M8.995,7.005 L8.995,7.005c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975l-1.99,1.99c-1.374,1.374-3.601,1.374-4.975,0l0,0c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975 l1.748-1.698"></path>
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M7.005,8.995 L7.005,8.995c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975l1.99-1.99c1.374-1.374,3.601-1.374,4.975,0l0,0c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975 l-1.748,1.698"></path>
  </g>
</svg></span></a></h2>
<p>You need to update the following packages to the latest versions in your <code>package.json</code> file(s):</p>
<ul>
<li><code>ai</code> package: <code>^6.0.0</code></li>
<li><code>@ai-sdk/provider</code> package: <code>^3.0.0</code></li>
<li><code>@ai-sdk/provider-utils</code> package: <code>^4.0.0</code></li>
<li><code>@ai-sdk/*</code> packages: <code>^3.0.0</code></li>
</ul>
<p>An example upgrade command would be:</p>
<div aria-label="code snippet" class="relative code-block-module__VkAzma__wrapper not-prose" data-geist-code-block=""><button aria-label="Copy code" class="code-block-module__VkAzma__copyButton code-block-module__VkAzma__copyFloatingButton" type="button"><svg data-testid="geist-icon" height="16" stroke-linejoin="round" style="color:currentColor" viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="16" aria-hidden="true"><path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M2.75 0.5C1.7835 0.5 1 1.2835 1 2.25V9.75C1 10.7165 1.7835 11.5 2.75 11.5H3.75H4.5V10H3.75H2.75C2.61193 10 2.5 9.88807 2.5 9.75V2.25C2.5 2.11193 2.61193 2 2.75 2H8.25C8.38807 2 8.5 2.11193 8.5 2.25V3H10V2.25C10 1.2835 9.2165 0.5 8.25 0.5H2.75ZM7.75 4.5C6.7835 4.5 6 5.2835 6 6.25V13.75C6 14.7165 6.7835 15.5 7.75 15.5H13.25C14.2165 15.5 15 14.7165 15 13.75V6.25C15 5.2835 14.2165 4.5 13.25 4.5H7.75ZM7.5 6.25C7.5 6.11193 7.61193 6 7.75 6H13.25C13.3881 6 13.5 6.11193 13.5 6.25V13.75C13.5 13.8881 13.3881 14 13.25 14H7.75C7.61193 14 7.5 13.8881 7.5 13.75V6.25Z" fill="currentColor"/></svg><svg data-testid="geist-icon" height="16" stroke-linejoin="round" style="color:currentColor" viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="16" aria-hidden="true"><path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M15.5607 3.99999L15.0303 4.53032L6.23744 13.3232C5.55403 14.0066 4.44599 14.0066 3.76257 13.3232L4.2929 12.7929L3.76257 13.3232L0.969676 10.5303L0.439346 9.99999L1.50001 8.93933L2.03034 9.46966L4.82323 12.2626C4.92086 12.3602 5.07915 12.3602 5.17678 12.2626L13.9697 3.46966L14.5 2.93933L15.5607 3.99999Z" fill="currentColor"/></svg></button><pre class="prism-code language-typescript code-block-module__VkAzma__pre"><code class="code-block-module__VkAzma__code" data-geist-code-block="true"><div class="line" data-geist-code-block-line="true" id="C78785e58-L1" data-highlighted="false" style="font-feature-settings:&quot;liga&quot; off"><button aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1" type="button" aria-label="Add line anchor to the URL" class="code-block-module__VkAzma__lineNumber">1</button><div class="token-line"><span class="token plain">pnpm install ai</span><span class="token decorator at operator">@</span><span class="token decorator function">latest</span><span class="token plain"> </span><span class="token decorator at operator">@</span><span class="token decorator function">ai</span><span class="token operator">-</span><span class="token plain">sdk</span><span class="token operator">/</span><span class="token plain">react</span><span class="token decorator at operator">@</span><span class="token decorator function">latest</span><span class="token plain"> </span><span class="token decorator at operator">@</span><span class="token decorator function">ai</span><span class="token operator">-</span><span class="token plain">sdk</span><span class="token operator">/</span><span class="token plain">openai</span><span class="token decorator at operator">@</span><span class="token decorator function">latest</span></div></div></code></pre></div>
<h2 id="codemods" data-docs-heading=""><a href="#codemods">Codemods<span><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" height="0.7em" width="0.7em">
  <g stroke-width="1.2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor">
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M8.995,7.005 L8.995,7.005c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975l-1.99,1.99c-1.374,1.374-3.601,1.374-4.975,0l0,0c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975 l1.748-1.698"></path>
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M7.005,8.995 L7.005,8.995c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975l1.99-1.99c1.374-1.374,3.601-1.374,4.975,0l0,0c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975 l-1.748,1.698"></path>
  </g>
</svg></span></a></h2>
<p>The AI SDK provides Codemod transformations to help upgrade your codebase when a
feature is deprecated, removed, or otherwise changed.</p>
<p>Codemods are transformations that run on your codebase automatically. They
allow you to easily apply many changes without having to manually go through
every file.</p>
<p>You can run all v6 codemods (v5 → v6 migration) by running the following command
from the root of your project:</p>
<div aria-label="code snippet" class="relative code-block-module__VkAzma__wrapper not-prose" data-geist-code-block=""><button aria-label="Copy code" class="code-block-module__VkAzma__copyButton code-block-module__VkAzma__copyFloatingButton" type="button"><svg data-testid="geist-icon" height="16" stroke-linejoin="round" style="color:currentColor" viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="16" aria-hidden="true"><path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M2.75 0.5C1.7835 0.5 1 1.2835 1 2.25V9.75C1 10.7165 1.7835 11.5 2.75 11.5H3.75H4.5V10H3.75H2.75C2.61193 10 2.5 9.88807 2.5 9.75V2.25C2.5 2.11193 2.61193 2 2.75 2H8.25C8.38807 2 8.5 2.11193 8.5 2.25V3H10V2.25C10 1.2835 9.2165 0.5 8.25 0.5H2.75ZM7.75 4.5C6.7835 4.5 6 5.2835 6 6.25V13.75C6 14.7165 6.7835 15.5 7.75 15.5H13.25C14.2165 15.5 15 14.7165 15 13.75V6.25C15 5.2835 14.2165 4.5 13.25 4.5H7.75ZM7.5 6.25C7.5 6.11193 7.61193 6 7.75 6H13.25C13.3881 6 13.5 6.11193 13.5 6.25V13.75C13.5 13.8881 13.3881 14 13.25 14H7.75C7.61193 14 7.5 13.8881 7.5 13.75V6.25Z" fill="currentColor"/></svg><svg data-testid="geist-icon" height="16" stroke-linejoin="round" style="color:currentColor" viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="16" aria-hidden="true"><path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M15.5607 3.99999L15.0303 4.53032L6.23744 13.3232C5.55403 14.0066 4.44599 14.0066 3.76257 13.3232L4.2929 12.7929L3.76257 13.3232L0.969676 10.5303L0.439346 9.99999L1.50001 8.93933L2.03034 9.46966L4.82323 12.2626C4.92086 12.3602 5.07915 12.3602 5.17678 12.2626L13.9697 3.46966L14.5 2.93933L15.5607 3.99999Z" fill="currentColor"/></svg></button><pre class="prism-code language-sh code-block-module__VkAzma__pre"><code class="code-block-module__VkAzma__code" data-geist-code-block="true"><div class="line" data-geist-code-block-line="true" id="C3d052111-L1" data-highlighted="false" style="font-feature-settings:&quot;liga&quot; off"><button aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1" type="button" aria-label="Add line anchor to the URL" class="code-block-module__VkAzma__lineNumber">1</button><div class="token-line"><span class="token plain">npx @ai-sdk/codemod v6</span></div></div></code></pre></div>
<div class="py-2"><div class="note-module__Sn_NHq__note v3-colors" data-geist-note="" data-version="v1"><div class="note-module__Sn_NHq__content" style="gap:12px"><span style="display:flex;height:16px"><svg data-testid="geist-icon" height="16" stroke-linejoin="round" style="color:currentColor" viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="16"><path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M8 14.5C11.5899 14.5 14.5 11.5899 14.5 8C14.5 4.41015 11.5899 1.5 8 1.5C4.41015 1.5 1.5 4.41015 1.5 8C1.5 11.5899 4.41015 14.5 8 14.5ZM8 16C12.4183 16 16 12.4183 16 8C16 3.58172 12.4183 0 8 0C3.58172 0 0 3.58172 0 8C0 12.4183 3.58172 16 8 16ZM6.25 7H7H7.74999C8.30227 7 8.74999 7.44772 8.74999 8V11.5V12.25H7.24999V11.5V8.5H7H6.25V7ZM8 6C8.55229 6 9 5.55228 9 5C9 4.44772 8.55229 4 8 4C7.44772 4 7 4.44772 7 5C7 5.55228 7.44772 6 8 6Z" fill="currentColor"/></svg></span><span><p>There is also an <code>npx @ai-sdk/codemod upgrade</code> command, but it runs all
codemods from all versions (v4, v5, and v6). Use <code>v6</code> when upgrading from v5.</p></span></div></div></div>
<p>Individual codemods can be run by specifying the name of the codemod:</p>
<div aria-label="code snippet" class="relative code-block-module__VkAzma__wrapper not-prose" data-geist-code-block=""><button aria-label="Copy code" class="code-block-module__VkAzma__copyButton code-block-module__VkAzma__copyFloatingButton" type="button"><svg data-testid="geist-icon" height="16" stroke-linejoin="round" style="color:currentColor" viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="16" aria-hidden="true"><path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M2.75 0.5C1.7835 0.5 1 1.2835 1 2.25V9.75C1 10.7165 1.7835 11.5 2.75 11.5H3.75H4.5V10H3.75H2.75C2.61193 10 2.5 9.88807 2.5 9.75V2.25C2.5 2.11193 2.61193 2 2.75 2H8.25C8.38807 2 8.5 2.11193 8.5 2.25V3H10V2.25C10 1.2835 9.2165 0.5 8.25 0.5H2.75ZM7.75 4.5C6.7835 4.5 6 5.2835 6 6.25V13.75C6 14.7165 6.7835 15.5 7.75 15.5H13.25C14.2165 15.5 15 14.7165 15 13.75V6.25C15 5.2835 14.2165 4.5 13.25 4.5H7.75ZM7.5 6.25C7.5 6.11193 7.61193 6 7.75 6H13.25C13.3881 6 13.5 6.11193 13.5 6.25V13.75C13.5 13.8881 13.3881 14 13.25 14H7.75C7.61193 14 7.5 13.8881 7.5 13.75V6.25Z" fill="currentColor"/></svg><svg data-testid="geist-icon" height="16" stroke-linejoin="round" style="color:currentColor" viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="16" aria-hidden="true"><path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M15.5607 3.99999L15.0303 4.53032L6.23744 13.3232C5.55403 14.0066 4.44599 14.0066 3.76257 13.3232L4.2929 12.7929L3.76257 13.3232L0.969676 10.5303L0.439346 9.99999L1.50001 8.93933L2.03034 9.46966L4.82323 12.2626C4.92086 12.3602 5.07915 12.3602 5.17678 12.2626L13.9697 3.46966L14.5 2.93933L15.5607 3.99999Z" fill="currentColor"/></svg></button><pre class="prism-code language-sh code-block-module__VkAzma__pre"><code class="code-block-module__VkAzma__code" data-geist-code-block="true"><div class="line" data-geist-code-block-line="true" id="C2aa63def-L1" data-highlighted="false" style="font-feature-settings:&quot;liga&quot; off"><button aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1" type="button" aria-label="Add line anchor to the URL" class="code-block-module__VkAzma__lineNumber">1</button><div class="token-line"><span class="token plain">npx @ai-sdk/codemod </span><span class="token operator">&lt;</span><span class="token plain">codemod-name</span><span class="token operator">&gt;</span><span class="token plain"> </span><span class="token operator">&lt;</span><span class="token plain">path</span><span class="token operator">&gt;</span></div></div></code></pre></div>
<p>For example, to run a specific v6 codemod:</p>

off"><button aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1" type="button" aria-label="Add line anchor to the URL" class="code-block-module__VkAzma__lineNumber">1</button><div class="token-line"><span class="token plain">npx @ai-sdk/codemod v6/rename-text-embedding-to-embedding src/</span></div></div></code></pre></div>
<div class="py-2"><div class="note-module__Sn_NHq__note v3-colors" data-geist-note="" data-version="v1"><div class="note-module__Sn_NHq__content" style="gap:12px"><span style="display:flex;height:16px"><svg data-testid="geist-icon" height="16" stroke-linejoin="round" style="color:currentColor" viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="16"><path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M8 14.5C11.5899 14.5 14.5 11.5899 14.5 8C14.5 4.41015 11.5899 1.5 8 1.5C4.41015 1.5 1.5 4.41015 1.5 8C1.5 11.5899 4.41015 14.5 8 14.5ZM8 16C12.4183 16 16 12.4183 16 8C16 3.58172 12.4183 0 8 0C3.58172 0 0 3.58172 0 8C0 12.4183 3.58172 16 8 16ZM6.25 7H7H7.74999C8.30227 7 8.74999 7.44772 8.74999 8V11.5V12.25H7.24999V11.5V8.5H7H6.25V7ZM8 6C8.55229 6 9 5.55228 9 5C9 4.44772 8.55229 4 8 4C7.44772 4 7 4.44772 7 5C7 5.55228 7.44772 6 8 6Z" fill="currentColor"/></svg></span><span><p>Codemods are intended as a tool to help you with the upgrade process. They may
not cover all of the changes you need to make. You may need to make additional
changes manually.</p></span></div></div></div>
<h2 id="codemod-table" data-docs-heading=""><a href="#codemod-table">Codemod Table<span><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" height="0.7em" width="0.7em">
  <g stroke-width="1.2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor">
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M8.995,7.005 L8.995,7.005c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975l-1.99,1.99c-1.374,1.374-3.601,1.374-4.975,0l0,0c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975 l1.748-1.698"></path>
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M7.005,8.995 L7.005,8.995c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975l1.99-1.99c1.374-1.374,3.601-1.374,4.975,0l0,0c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975 l-1.748,1.698"></path>
  </g>
</svg></span></a></h2>
<div class="overflow-x-auto"><table class="w-full table-auto"><thead><tr><th>Codemod Name</th><th>Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><code>rename-text-embedding-to-embedding</code></td><td>Renames <code>textEmbeddingModel</code> to <code>embeddingModel</code> and <code>textEmbedding</code> to <code>embedding</code> on providers</td></tr><tr><td><code>rename-mock-v2-to-v3</code></td><td>Renames V2 mock classes from <code>ai/test</code> to V3 (e.g., <code>MockLanguageModelV2</code> → <code>MockLanguageModelV3</code>)</td></tr><tr><td><code>rename-tool-call-options-to-tool-execution-options</code></td><td>Renames the <code>ToolCallOptions</code> type to <code>ToolExecutionOptions</code></td></tr><tr><td><code>rename-core-message-to-model-message</code></td><td>Renames the <code>CoreMessage</code> type to <code>ModelMessage</code></td></tr><tr><td><code>rename-converttocoremessages-to-converttomodelmessages</code></td><td>Renames <code>convertToCoreMessages</code> function to <code>convertToModelMessages</code></td></tr><tr><td><code>rename-vertex-provider-metadata-key</code></td><td>Renames <code>google</code> to <code>vertex</code> in <code>providerMetadata</code> and <code>providerOptions</code> for Google Vertex files</td></tr><tr><td><code>wrap-tomodeloutput-parameter</code></td><td>Wraps <code>toModelOutput</code> parameter in object destructuring (<code>output</code> → <code>{ output }</code>)</td></tr><tr><td><code>add-await-converttomodelmessages</code></td><td>Adds <code>await</code> to <code>convertToModelMessages</code> calls (now async in AI SDK 6)</td></tr></tbody></table></div>
<h2 id="ai-sdk-core" data-docs-heading=""><a href="#ai-sdk-core">AI SDK Core<span><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" height="0.7em" width="0.7em">
  <g stroke-width="1.2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor">
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M8.995,7.005 L8.995,7.005c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975l-1.99,1.99c-1.374,1.374-3.601,1.374-4.975,0l0,0c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975 l1.748-1.698"></path>
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M7.005,8.995 L7.005,8.995c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975l1.99-1.99c1.374-1.374,3.601-1.374,4.975,0l0,0c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975 l-1.748,1.698"></path>
  </g>
</svg></span></a></h2>
<h3 id="experimental_agent-to-toolloopagent-class" data-docs-heading=""><a href="#experimental_agent-to-toolloopagent-class"><code>Experimental_Agent</code> to <code>ToolLoopAgent</code> Class<span><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" height="0.7em" width="0.7em">
  <g stroke-width="1.2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor">
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M8.995,7.005 L8.995,7.005c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975l-1.99,1.99c-1.374,1.374-3.601,1.374-4.975,0l0,0c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975 l1.748-1.698"></path>
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M7.005,8.995 L7.005,8.995c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975l1.99-1.99c1.374-1.374,3.601-1.374,4.975,0l0,0c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975 l-1.748,1.698"></path>
  </g>
</svg></span></a></h3>
<p>The <code>Experimental_Agent</code> class has been replaced with the <code>ToolLoopAgent</code> class. Two key changes:</p>
<ol>
<li>The <code>system</code> parameter has been renamed to <code>instructions</code></li>
<li>The default <code>stopWhen</code> has changed from <code>stepCountIs(1)</code> to <code>stepCountIs(20)</code></li>
</ol>

<h3 id="coremessage-removal" data-docs-heading=""><a href="#coremessage-removal"><code>CoreMessage</code> Removal<span><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" height="0.7em" width="0.7em">
  <g stroke-width="1.2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor">
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M8.995,7.005 L8.995,7.005c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975l-1.99,1.99c-1.374,1.374-3.601,1.374-4.975,0l0,0c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975 l1.748-1.698"></path>
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M7.005,8.995 L7.005,8.995c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975l1.99-1.99c1.374-1.374,3.601-1.374,4.975,0l0,0c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975 l-1.748,1.698"></path>
  </g>
</svg></span></a></h3>
<p>The deprecated <code>CoreMessage</code> type and related functions have been removed (<a href="https://github.com/vercel/ai/pull/10710" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">PR #10710<span class="inline-flex"><svg data-testid="geist-icon" height="16" stroke-linejoin="round" style="width:14px;height:14px;color:currentColor" viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="16"><path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M5.75001 2H5.00001V3.5H5.75001H11.4393L2.21968 12.7197L1.68935 13.25L2.75001 14.3107L3.28034 13.7803L12.4988 4.56182V10.25V11H13.9988V10.25V3C13.9988 2.44772 13.5511 2 12.9988 2H5.75001Z" fill="currentColor"/></svg></span></a>). Replace <code>convertToCoreMessages</code> with <code>convertToModelMessages</code>.</p>

<div class="py-2"><div class="note-module__Sn_NHq__note v3-colors" data-geist-note="" data-version="v1"><div class="note-module__Sn_NHq__content" style="gap:12px"><span style="display:flex;height:16px"><svg data-testid="geist-icon" height="16" stroke-linejoin="round" style="color:currentColor" viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="16"><path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M8 14.5C11.5899 14.5 14.5 11.5899 14.5 8C14.5 4.41015 11.5899 1.5 8 1.5C4.41015 1.5 1.5 4.41015 1.5 8C1.5 11.5899 4.41015 14.5 8 14.5ZM8 16C12.4183 16 16 12.4183 16 8C16 3.58172 12.4183 0 8 0C3.58172 0 0 3.58172 0 8C0 12.4183 3.58172 16 8 16ZM6.25 7H7H7.74999C8.30227 7 8.74999 7.44772 8.74999 8V11.5V12.25H7.24999V11.5V8.5H7H6.25V7ZM8 6C8.55229 6 9 5.55228 9 5C9 4.44772 8.55229 4 8 4C7.44772 4 7 4.44772 7 5C7 5.55228 7.44772 6 8 6Z" fill="currentColor"/></svg></span><span><p>Use the <code>rename-core-message-to-model-message</code> and
<code>rename-converttocoremessages-to-converttomodelmessages</code> codemods to
automatically update your codebase.</p></span></div></div></div>
<h3 id="generateobject-and-streamobject-deprecation" data-docs-heading=""><a href="#generateobject-and-streamobject-deprecation"><code>generateObject</code> and <code>streamObject</code> Deprecation<span><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" height="0.7em" width="0.7em">
  <g stroke-width="1.2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor">
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M8.995,7.005 L8.995,7.005c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975l-1.99,1.99c-1.374,1.374-3.601,1.374-4.975,0l0,0c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975 l1.748-1.698"></path>
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M7.005,8.995 L7.005,8.995c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975l1.99-1.99c1.374-1.374,3.601-1.374,4.975,0l0,0c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975 l-1.748,1.698"></path>
  </g>
</svg></span></a></h3>
<p><code>generateObject</code> and <code>streamObject</code> have been deprecated (<a href="https://github.com/vercel/ai/pull/10754" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">PR #10754<span class="inline-flex"><svg data-testid="geist-icon" height="16" stroke-linejoin="round" style="width:14px;height:14px;color:currentColor" viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="16"><path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M5.75001 2H5.00001V3.5H5.75001H11.4393L2.21968 12.7197L1.68935 13.25L2.75001 14.3107L3.28034 13.7803L12.4988 4.56182V10.25V11H13.9988V10.25V3C13.9988 2.44772 13.5511 2 12.9988 2H5.75001Z" fill="currentColor"/></svg></span></a>).
They will be removed in a future version.
Use <code>generateText</code> and <code>streamText</code> with an <code>output</code> setting instead.</p>

<h3 id="async-converttomodelmessages" data-docs-heading=""><a href="#async-converttomodelmessages">async <code>convertToModelMessages</code><span><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" height="0.7em" width="0.7em">
  <g stroke-width="1.2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor">
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M8.995,7.005 L8.995,7.005c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975l-1.99,1.99c-1.374,1.374-3.601,1.374-4.975,0l0,0c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975 l1.748-1.698"></path>

<p><code>convertToModelMessages()</code> is async in AI SDK 6 to support async <code>Tool.toModelOutput()</code>.</p>

<h3 id="tooltomodeloutput-changes" data-docs-heading=""><a href="#tooltomodeloutput-changes"><code>Tool.toModelOutput</code> changes<span><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" height="0.7em" width="0.7em">
  <g stroke-width="1.2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor">
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M8.995,7.005 L8.995,7.005c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975l-1.99,1.99c-1.374,1.374-3.601,1.374-4.975,0l0,0c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975 l1.748-1.698"></path>
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M7.005,8.995 L7.005,8.995c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975l1.99-1.99c1.374-1.374,3.601-1.374,4.975,0l0,0c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975 l-1.748,1.698"></path>
  </g>
</svg></span></a></h3>
<p><code>toModelOutput()</code> receives a parameter object with an <code>output</code> property in AI SDK 6.</p>
<p>In AI SDK 5, the <code>output</code> was the arguments.</p>

<div class="py-2"><div class="note-module__Sn_NHq__note v3-colors" data-geist-note="" data-version="v1"><div class="note-module__Sn_NHq__content" style="gap:12px"><span style="display:flex;height:16px"><svg data-testid="geist-icon" height="16" stroke-linejoin="round" style="color:currentColor" viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="16"><path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M8 14.5C11.5899 14.5 14.5 11.5899 14.5 8C14.5 4.41015 11.5899 1.5 8 1.5C4.41015 1.5 1.5 4.41015 1.5 8C1.5 11.5899 4.41015 14.5 8 14.5ZM8 16C12.4183 16 16 12.4183 16 8C16 3.58172 12.4183 0 8 0C3.58172 0 0 3.58172 0 8C0 12.4183 3.58172 16 8 16ZM6.25 7H7H7.74999C8.30227 7 8.74999 7.44772 8.74999 8V11.5V12.25H7.24999V11.5V8.5H7H6.25V7ZM8 6C8.55229 6 9 5.55228 9 5C9 4.44772 8.55229 4 8 4C7.44772 4 7 4.44772 7 5C7 5.55228 7.44772 6 8 6Z" fill="currentColor"/></svg></span><span><p>Use the <code>wrap-tomodeloutput-parameter</code> codemod to automatically update your
codebase.</p></span></div></div></div>
<h3 id="cachedinputtokens-and-reasoningtokens-in-languagemodelusage-deprecation" data-docs-heading=""><a href="#cachedinputtokens-and-reasoningtokens-in-languagemodelusage-deprecation"><code>cachedInputTokens</code> and <code>reasoningTokens</code> in <code>LanguageModelUsage</code> Deprecation<span><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" height="0.7em" width="0.7em">
  <g stroke-width="1.2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor">
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M8.995,7.005 L8.995,7.005c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975l-1.99,1.99c-1.374,1.374-3.601,1.374-4.975,0l0,0c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975 l1.748-1.698"></path>
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M7.005,8.995 L7.005,8.995c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975l1.99-1.99c1.374-1.374,3.601-1.374,4.975,0l0,0c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975 l-1.748,1.698"></path>
  </g>
</svg></span></a></h3>
<p><code>cachedInputTokens</code> and <code>reasoningTokens</code> in <code>LanguageModelUsage</code> have been deprecated.</p>
<p>You can replace <code>cachedInputTokens</code> with <code>inputTokenDetails.cacheReadTokens</code>
and <code>reasoningTokens</code> with <code>outputTokenDetails.reasoningTokens</code>.</p>
<h3 id="toolcalloptions-to-toolexecutionoptions-rename" data-docs-heading=""><a href="#toolcalloptions-to-toolexecutionoptions-rename"><code>ToolCallOptions</code> to <code>ToolExecutionOptions</code> Rename<span><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" height="0.7em" width="0.7em">
  <g stroke-width="1.2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor">
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M8.995,7.005 L8.995,7.005c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975l-1.99,1.99c-1.374,1.374-3.601,1.374-4.975,0l0,0c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975 l1.748-1.698"></path>
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M7.005,8.995 L7.005,8.995c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975l1.99-1.99c1.374-1.374,3.601-1.374,4.975,0l0,0c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975 l-1.748,1.698"></path>
  </g>
</svg></span></a></h3>
<p>The <code>ToolCallOptions</code> type has been renamed to <code>ToolExecutionOptions</code>
and is now deprecated.</p>
<div class="py-2"><div class="note-module__Sn_NHq__note v3-colors" data-geist-note="" data-version="v1"><div class="note-module__Sn_NHq__content" style="gap:12px"><span style="display:flex;height:16px"><svg data-testid="geist-icon" height="16" stroke-linejoin="round" style="color:currentColor" viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="16"><path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M8 14.5C11.5899 14.5 14.5 11.5899 14.5 8C14.5 4.41015 11.5899 1.5 8 1.5C4.41015 1.5 1.5 4.41015 1.5 8C1.5 11.5899 4.41015 14.5 8 14.5ZM8 16C12.4183 16 16 12.4183 16 8C16 3.58172 12.4183 0 8 0C3.58172 0 0 3.58172 0 8C0 12.4183 3.58172 16 8 16ZM6.25 7H7H7.74999C8.30227 7 8.74999 7.44772 8.74999 8V11.5V12.25H7.24999V11.5V8.5H7H6.25V7ZM8 6C8.55229 6 9 5.55228 9 5C9 4.44772 8.55229 4 8 4C7.44772 4 7 4.44772 7 5C7 5.55228 7.44772 6 8 6Z" fill="currentColor"/></svg></span><span><p>Use the <code>rename-tool-call-options-to-tool-execution-options</code> codemod to
automatically update your codebase.</p></span></div></div></div>
<h3 id="per-tool-strict-mode" data-docs-heading=""><a href="#per-tool-strict-mode">Per-Tool Strict Mode<span><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" height="0.7em" width="0.7em">
  <g stroke-width="1.2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor">
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M8.995,7.005 L8.995,7.005c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975l-1.99,1.99c-1.374,1.374-3.601,1.374-4.975,0l0,0c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975 l1.748-1.698"></path>
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M7.005,8.995 L7.005,8.995c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975l1.99-1.99c1.374-1.374,3.601-1.374,4.975,0l0,0c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975 l-1.748,1.698"></path>
  </g>
</svg></span></a></h3>
<p>Strict mode for tools is now controlled by setting <code>strict</code> on each tool (<a href="https://github.com/vercel/ai/pull/10817" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">PR #10817<span class="inline-flex"><svg data-testid="geist-icon" height="16" stroke-linejoin="round" style="width:14px;height:14px;color:currentColor" viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="16"><path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M5.75001 2H5.00001V3.5H5.75001H11.4393L2.21968 12.7197L1.68935 13.25L2.75001 14.3107L3.28034 13.7803L12.4988 4.56182V10.25V11H13.9988V10.25V3C13.9988 2.44772 13.5511 2 12.9988 2H5.75001Z" fill="currentColor"/></svg></span></a>). This enables fine-grained control over strict tool calls, which is important since strict mode depends on the specific tool input schema.</p>

<h3 id="flexible-tool-content" data-docs-heading=""><a href="#flexible-tool-content">Flexible Tool Content<span><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" height="0.7em" width="0.7em">
  <g stroke-width="1.2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor">
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M8.995,7.005 L8.995,7.005c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975l-1.99,1.99c-1.374,1.374-3.601,1.374-4.975,0l0,0c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975 l1.748-1.698"></path>
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M7.005,8.995 L7.005,8.995c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975l1.99-1.99c1.374-1.374,3.601-1.374,4.975,0l0,0c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975 l-1.748,1.698"></path>
  </g>
</svg></span></a></h3>
<p>AI SDK 6 introduces more flexible tool output and result content support (<a href="https://github.com/vercel/ai/pull/9605" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">PR #9605<span class="inline-flex"><svg data-testid="geist-icon" height="16" stroke-linejoin="round" style="width:14px;height:14px;color:currentColor" viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="16"><path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M5.75001 2H5.00001V3.5H5.75001H11.4393L2.21968 12.7197L1.68935 13.25L2.75001 14.3107L3.28034 13.7803L12.4988 4.56182V10.25V11H13.9988V10.25V3C13.9988 2.44772 13.5511 2 12.9988 2H5.75001Z" fill="currentColor"/></svg></span></a>), enabling richer tool interactions and better support for complex tool execution patterns.</p>
<h3 id="toolcallrepairfunction-signature" data-docs-heading=""><a href="#toolcallrepairfunction-signature"><code>ToolCallRepairFunction</code> Signature<span><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" height="0.7em" width="0.7em">
  <g stroke-width="1.2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor">
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M8.995,7.005 L8.995,7.005c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975l-1.99,1.99c-1.374,1.374-3.601,1.374-4.975,0l0,0c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975 l1.748-1.698"></path>
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M7.005,8.995 L7.005,8.995c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975l1.99-1.99c1.374-1.374,3.601-1.374,4.975,0l0,0c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975 l-1.748,1.698"></path>
  </g>
</svg></span></a></h3>
<p>The <code>system</code> parameter in the <code>ToolCallRepairFunction</code> type now accepts <code>SystemModelMessage</code> in addition to <code>string</code> (<a href="https://github.com/vercel/ai/pull/10635" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">PR #10635<span class="inline-flex"><svg data-testid="geist-icon" height="16" stroke-linejoin="round" style="width:14px;height:14px;color:currentColor" viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="16"><path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M5.75001 2H5.00001V3.5H5.75001H11.4393L2.21968 12.7197L1.68935 13.25L2.75001 14.3107L3.28034 13.7803L12.4988 4.56182V10.25V11H13.9988V10.25V3C13.9988 2.44772 13.5511 2 12.9988 2H5.75001Z" fill="currentColor"/></svg></span></a>). This allows for more flexible system message configuration, including provider-specific options like caching.</p>

<h3 id="embedding-model-method-rename" data-docs-heading=""><a href="#embedding-model-method-rename">Embedding Model Method Rename<span><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" height="0.7em" width="0.7em">
  <g stroke-width="1.2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor">
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M8.995,7.005 L8.995,7.005c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975l-1.99,1.99c-1.374,1.374-3.601,1.374-4.975,0l0,0c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975 l1.748-1.698"></path>
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M7.005,8.995 L7.005,8.995c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975l1.99-1.99c1.374-1.374,3.601-1.374,4.975,0l0,0c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975 l-1.748,1.698"></path>
  </g>
</svg></span></a></h3>
<p>The <code>textEmbeddingModel</code> and <code>textEmbedding</code> methods on providers have been renamed to <code>embeddingModel</code> and <code>embedding</code> respectively. Additionally, generics have been removed from <code>EmbeddingModel</code>, <code>embed</code>, and <code>embedMany</code> (<a href="https://github.com/vercel/ai/pull/10592" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">PR #10592<span class="inline-flex"><svg data-testid="geist-icon" height="16" stroke-linejoin="round" style="width:14px;height:14px;color:currentColor" viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="16"><path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M5.75001 2H5.00001V3.5H5.75001H11.4393L2.21968 12.7197L1.68935 13.25L2.75001 14.3107L3.28034 13.7803L12.4988 4.56182V10.25V11H13.9988V10.25V3C13.9988 2.44772 13.5511 2 12.9988 2H5.75001Z" fill="currentColor"/></svg></span></a>).</p>

<div class="py-2"><div class="note-module__Sn_NHq__note v3-colors" data-geist-note="" data-version="v1"><div class="note-module__Sn_NHq__content" style="gap:12px"><span style="display:flex;height:16px"><svg data-testid="geist-icon" height="16" stroke-linejoin="round" style="color:currentColor" viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="16"><path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M8 14.5C11.5899 14.5 14.5 11.5899 14.5 8C14.5 4.41015 11.5899 1.5 8 1.5C4.41015 1.5 1.5 4.41015 1.5 8C1.5 11.5899 4.41015 14.5 8 14.5ZM8 16C12.4183 16 16 12.4183 16 8C16 3.58172 12.4183 0 8 0C3.58172 0 0 3.58172 0 8C0 12.4183 3.58172 16 8 16ZM6.25 7H7H7.74999C8.30227 7 8.74999 7.44772 8.74999 8V11.5V12.25H7.24999V11.5V8.5H7H6.25V7ZM8 6C8.55229 6 9 5.55228 9 5C9 4.44772 8.55229 4 8 4C7.44772 4 7 4.44772 7 5C7 5.55228 7.44772 6 8 6Z" fill="currentColor"/></svg></span><span><p>Use the <code>rename-text-embedding-to-embedding</code> codemod to automatically update
your codebase.</p></span></div></div></div>
<h3 id="warning-logger" data-docs-heading=""><a href="#warning-logger">Warning Logger<span><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" height="0.7em" width="0.7em">
  <g stroke-width="1.2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor">
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M8.995,7.005 L8.995,7.005c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975l-1.99,1.99c-1.374,1.374-3.601,1.374-4.975,0l0,0c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975 l1.748-1.698"></path>
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M7.005,8.995 L7.005,8.995c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975l1.99-1.99c1.374-1.374,3.601-1.374,4.975,0l0,0c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975 l-1.748,1.698"></path>
  </g>
</svg></span></a></h3>
<p>AI SDK 6 introduces a warning logger that outputs deprecation warnings and best practice recommendations (<a href="https://github.com/vercel/ai/pull/8343" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">PR #8343<span class="inline-flex"><svg data-testid="geist-icon" height="16" stroke-linejoin="round" style="width:14px;height:14px;color:currentColor" viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="16"><path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M5.75001 2H5.00001V3.5H5.75001H11.4393L2.21968 12.7197L1.68935 13.25L2.75001 14.3107L3.28034 13.7803L12.4988 4.56182V10.25V11H13.9988V10.25V3C13.9988 2.44772 13.5511 2 12.9988 2H5.75001Z" fill="currentColor"/></svg></span></a>).</p>
<p>To disable warning logging, set the <code>AI_SDK_LOG_WARNINGS</code> environment variable to <code>false</code>:</p>
<div aria-label="code snippet" class="relative code-block-module__VkAzma__wrapper not-prose" data-geist-code-block=""><button aria-label="Copy code" class="code-block-module__VkAzma__copyButton code-block-module__VkAzma__copyFloatingButton" type="button"><svg data-testid="geist-icon" height="16" stroke-linejoin="round" style="color:currentColor" viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="16" aria-hidden="true"><path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M2.75 0.5C1.7835 0.5 1 1.2835 1 2.25V9.75C1 10.7165 1.7835 11.5 2.75 11.5H3.75H4.5V10H3.75H2.75C2.61193 10 2.5 9.88807 2.5 9.75V2.25C2.5 2.11193 2.61193 2 2.75 2H8.25C8.38807 2 8.5 2.11193 8.5 2.25V3H10V2.25C10 1.2835 9.2165 0.5 8.25 0.5H2.75ZM7.75 4.5C6.7835 4.5 6 5.2835 6 6.25V13.75C6 14.7165 6.7835 15.5 7.75 15.5H13.25C14.2165 15.5 15 14.7165 15 13.75V6.25C15 5.2835 14.2165 4.5 13.25 4.5H7.75ZM7.5 6.25C7.5 6.11193 7.61193 6 7.75 6H13.25C13.3881 6 13.5 6.11193 13.5 6.25V13.75C13.5 13.8881 13.3881 14 13.25 14H7.75C7.61193 14 7.5 13.8881 7.5 13.75V6.25Z" fill="currentColor"/></svg><svg data-testid="geist-icon" height="16" stroke-linejoin="round" style="color:currentColor" viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="16" aria-hidden="true"><path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M15.5607 3.99999L15.0303 4.53032L6.23744 13.3232C5.55403 14.0066 4.44599 14.0066 3.76257 13.3232L4.2929 12.7929L3.76257 13.3232L0.969676 10.5303L0.439346 9.99999L1.50001 8.93933L2.03034 9.46966L4.82323 12.2626C4.92086 12.3602 5.07915 12.3602 5.17678 12.2626L13.9697 3.46966L14.5 2.93933L15.5607 3.99999Z" fill="currentColor"/></svg></button><pre class="prism-code language-bash code-block-module__VkAzma__pre"><code class="code-block-module__VkAzma__code" data-geist-code-block="true"><div class="line" data-geist-code-block-line="true" id="C3054e298-L1" data-highlighted="false" style="font-feature-settings:&quot;liga&quot; off"><button aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1" type="button" aria-label="Add line anchor to the URL" class="code-block-module__VkAzma__lineNumber">1</button><div class="token-line"><span class="token builtin class-name">export</span><span class="token plain"> </span><span class="token assign-left variable">AI_SDK_LOG_WARNINGS</span><span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token plain">false</span></div></div></code></pre></div>
<h3 id="warning-type-unification" data-docs-heading=""><a href="#warning-type-unification">Warning Type Unification<span><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" height="0.7em" width="0.7em">
  <g stroke-width="1.2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor">
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M8.995,7.005 L8.995,7.005c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975l-1.99,1.99c-1.374,1.374-3.601,1.374-4.975,0l0,0c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975 l1.748-1.698"></path>
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M7.005,8.995 L7.005,8.995c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975l1.99-1.99c1.374-1.374,3.601-1.374,4.975,0l0,0c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975 l-1.748,1.698"></path>
  </g>
</svg></span></a></h3>
<p>Separate warning types for each generation function have been consolidated into a single <code>Warning</code> type exported from the <code>ai</code> package (<a href="https://github.com/vercel/ai/pull/10631" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">PR #10631<span class="inline-flex"><svg data-testid="geist-icon" height="16" stroke-linejoin="round" style="width:14px;height:14px;color:currentColor" viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="16"><path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M5.75001 2H5.00001V3.5H5.75001H11.4393L2.21968 12.7197L1.68935 13.25L2.75001 14.3107L3.28034 13.7803L12.4988 4.56182V10.25V11H13.9988V10.25V3C13.9988 2.44772 13.5511 2 12.9988 2H5.75001Z" fill="currentColor"/></svg></span></a>).</p>

<h3 id="finish-reason-unknown-merged-into-other" data-docs-heading=""><a href="#finish-reason-unknown-merged-into-other">Finish reason &quot;unknown&quot; merged into &quot;other&quot;<span><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" height="0.7em" width="0.7em">
  <g stroke-width="1.2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor">
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M8.995,7.005 L8.995,7.005c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975l-1.99,1.99c-1.374,1.374-3.601,1.374-4.975,0l0,0c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975 l1.748-1.698"></path>
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M7.005,8.995 L7.005,8.995c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975l1.99-1.99c1.374-1.374,3.601-1.374,4.975,0l0,0c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975 l-1.748,1.698"></path>
  </g>
</svg></span></a></h3>
<p>The <code>unknown</code> finish reason has been removed. It is now returned as <code>other</code>.</p>
<h2 id="ai-sdk-ui" data-docs-heading=""><a href="#ai-sdk-ui">AI SDK UI<span><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" height="0.7em" width="0.7em">
  <g stroke-width="1.2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor">
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M8.995,7.005 L8.995,7.005c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975l-1.99,1.99c-1.374,1.374-3.601,1.374-4.975,0l0,0c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975 l1.748-1.698"></path>
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M7.005,8.995 L7.005,8.995c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975l1.99-1.99c1.374-1.374,3.601-1.374,4.975,0l0,0c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975 l-1.748,1.698"></path>
  </g>
</svg></span></a></h2>
<h3 id="tool-ui-part-helper-functions-rename" data-docs-heading=""><a href="#tool-ui-part-helper-functions-rename">Tool UI Part Helper Functions Rename<span><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" height="0.7em" width="0.7em">
  <g stroke-width="1.2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor">
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M8.995,7.005 L8.995,7.005c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975l-1.99,1.99c-1.374,1.374-3.601,1.374-4.975,0l0,0c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975 l1.748-1.698"></path>
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M7.005,8.995 L7.005,8.995c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975l1.99-1.99c1.374-1.374,3.601-1.374,4.975,0l0,0c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975 l-1.748,1.698"></path>
  </g>
</svg></span></a></h3>
<p>The tool UI part helper functions have been renamed to better reflect their purpose and to accommodate both static and dynamic tool parts (<a href="https://github.com/vercel/ai/pull/XXXX" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">PR #XXXX<span class="inline-flex"><svg data-testid="geist-icon" height="16" stroke-linejoin="round" style="width:14px;height:14px;color:currentColor" viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="16"><path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M5.75001 2H5.00001V3.5H5.75001H11.4393L2.21968 12.7197L1.68935 13.25L2.75001 14.3107L3.28034 13.7803L12.4988 4.56182V10.25V11H13.9988V10.25V3C13.9988 2.44772 13.5511 2 12.9988 2H5.75001Z" fill="currentColor"/></svg></span></a>).</p>
<h4 id="istooluipart--isstatictooluipart" data-docs-heading=""><a href="#istooluipart--isstatictooluipart"><code>isToolUIPart</code> → <code>isStaticToolUIPart</code><span><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" height="0.7em" width="0.7em">
  <g stroke-width="1.2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor">
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M8.995,7.005 L8.995,7.005c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975l-1.99,1.99c-1.374,1.374-3.601,1.374-4.975,0l0,0c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975 l1.748-1.698"></path>
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M7.005,8.995 L7.005,8.995c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975l1.99-1.99c1.374-1.374,3.601-1.374,4.975,0l0,0c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975 l-1.748,1.698"></path>
  </g>
</svg></span></a></h4>
<p>The <code>isToolUIPart</code> function has been renamed to <code>isStaticToolUIPart</code> to clarify that it checks for static tool parts only.</p>

<h4 id="istoolordynamictooluipart--istooluipart" data-docs-heading=""><a href="#istoolordynamictooluipart--istooluipart"><code>isToolOrDynamicToolUIPart</code> → <code>isToolUIPart</code><span><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" height="0.7em" width="0.7em">
  <g stroke-width="1.2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor">
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M8.995,7.005 L8.995,7.005c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975l-1.99,1.99c-1.374,1.374-3.601,1.374-4.975,0l0,0c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975 l1.748-1.698"></path>

<p>The <code>isToolOrDynamicToolUIPart</code> function has been renamed to <code>isToolUIPart</code>. The old name is deprecated but still available.</p>

<h4 id="gettoolname--getstatictoolname" data-docs-heading=""><a href="#gettoolname--getstatictoolname"><code>getToolName</code> → <code>getStaticToolName</code><span><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" height="0.7em" width="0.7em">
  <g stroke-width="1.2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor">
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M8.995,7.005 L8.995,7.005c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975l-1.99,1.99c-1.374,1.374-3.601,1.374-4.975,0l0,0c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975 l1.748-1.698"></path>
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M7.005,8.995 L7.005,8.995c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975l1.99-1.99c1.374-1.374,3.601-1.374,4.975,0l0,0c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975 l-1.748,1.698"></path>
  </g>
</svg></span></a></h4>
<p>The <code>getToolName</code> function has been renamed to <code>getStaticToolName</code> to clarify that it returns the tool name from static tool parts only.</p>

<h2 id="providers" data-docs-heading=""><a href="#providers">Providers<span><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" height="0.7em" width="0.7em">
  <g stroke-width="1.2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor">
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M8.995,7.005 L8.995,7.005c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975l-1.99,1.99c-1.374,1.374-3.601,1.374-4.975,0l0,0c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975 l1.748-1.698"></path>
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M7.005,8.995 L7.005,8.995c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975l1.99-1.99c1.374-1.374,3.601-1.374,4.975,0l0,0c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975 l-1.748,1.698"></path>
  </g>
</svg></span></a></h2>
<h3 id="openai" data-docs-heading=""><a href="#openai">OpenAI<span><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" height="0.7em" width="0.7em">
  <g stroke-width="1.2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor">
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M8.995,7.005 L8.995,7.005c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975l-1.99,1.99c-1.374,1.374-3.601,1.374-4.975,0l0,0c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975 l1.748-1.698"></path>
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M7.005,8.995 L7.005,8.995c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975l1.99-1.99c1.374-1.374,3.601-1.374,4.975,0l0,0c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975 l-1.748,1.698"></path>
  </g>
</svg></span></a></h3>
<h4 id="strictjsonschema-defaults-to-true" data-docs-heading=""><a href="#strictjsonschema-defaults-to-true"><code>strictJsonSchema</code> Defaults to True<span><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" height="0.7em" width="0.7em">
  <g stroke-width="1.2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor">
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M8.995,7.005 L8.995,7.005c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975l-1.99,1.99c-1.374,1.374-3.601,1.374-4.975,0l0,0c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975 l1.748-1.698"></path>
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M7.005,8.995 L7.005,8.995c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975l1.99-1.99c1.374-1.374,3.601-1.374,4.975,0l0,0c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975 l-1.748,1.698"></path>
  </g>
</svg></span></a></h4>
<p>The <code>strictJsonSchema</code> setting for JSON outputs and tool calls is enabled by default (<a href="https://github.com/vercel/ai/pull/10752" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">PR #10752<span class="inline-flex"><svg data-testid="geist-icon" height="16" stroke-linejoin="round" style="width:14px;height:14px;color:currentColor" viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="16"><path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M5.75001 2H5.00001V3.5H5.75001H11.4393L2.21968 12.7197L1.68935 13.25L2.75001 14.3107L3.28034 13.7803L12.4988 4.56182V10.25V11H13.9988V10.25V3C13.9988 2.44772 13.5511 2 12.9988 2H5.75001Z" fill="currentColor"/></svg></span></a>). This improves stability and ensures valid JSON output that matches your schema.</p>
<p>However, strict mode is stricter about schema requirements. If you receive schema rejection errors, adjust your schema (for example, use <code>null</code> instead of <code>undefined</code>) or disable strict mode.</p>

<h4 id="structuredoutputs-option-removed-from-chat-model" data-docs-heading=""><a href="#structuredoutputs-option-removed-from-chat-model"><code>structuredOutputs</code> Option Removed from Chat Model<span><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" height="0.7em" width="0.7em">
  <g stroke-width="1.2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor">
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M8.995,7.005 L8.995,7.005c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975l-1.99,1.99c-1.374,1.374-3.601,1.374-4.975,0l0,0c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975 l1.748-1.698"></path>
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M7.005,8.995 L7.005,8.995c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975l1.99-1.99c1.374-1.374,3.601-1.374,4.975,0l0,0c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975 l-1.748,1.698"></path>
  </g>
</svg></span></a></h4>
<p>The <code>structuredOutputs</code> provider option has been removed from chat models (<a href="https://github.com/vercel/ai/pull/10752" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">PR #10752<span class="inline-flex"><svg data-testid="geist-icon" height="16" stroke-linejoin="round" style="width:14px;height:14px;color:currentColor" viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="16"><path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M5.75001 2H5.00001V3.5H5.75001H11.4393L2.21968 12.7197L1.68935 13.25L2.75001 14.3107L3.28034 13.7803L12.4988 4.56182V10.25V11H13.9988V10.25V3C13.9988 2.44772 13.5511 2 12.9988 2H5.75001Z" fill="currentColor"/></svg></span></a>). Use <code>strictJsonSchema</code> instead.</p>
<h3 id="azure" data-docs-heading=""><a href="#azure">Azure<span><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" height="0.7em" width="0.7em">
  <g stroke-width="1.2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor">
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M8.995,7.005 L8.995,7.005c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975l-1.99,1.99c-1.374,1.374-3.601,1.374-4.975,0l0,0c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975 l1.748-1.698"></path>
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M7.005,8.995 L7.005,8.995c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975l1.99-1.99c1.374-1.374,3.601-1.374,4.975,0l0,0c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975 l-1.748,1.698"></path>
  </g>
</svg></span></a></h3>
<h4 id="default-provider-uses-responses-api" data-docs-heading=""><a href="#default-provider-uses-responses-api">Default Provider Uses Responses API<span><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" height="0.7em" width="0.7em">
  <g stroke-width="1.2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor">
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M8.995,7.005 L8.995,7.005c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975l-1.99,1.99c-1.374,1.374-3.601,1.374-4.975,0l0,0c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975 l1.748-1.698"></path>
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M7.005,8.995 L7.005,8.995c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975l1.99-1.99c1.374-1.374,3.601-1.374,4.975,0l0,0c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975 l-1.748,1.698"></path>
  </g>
</svg></span></a></h4>
<p>The <code>@ai-sdk/azure</code> provider now uses the Responses API by default when calling <code>azure()</code> (<a href="https://github.com/vercel/ai/pull/9868" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">PR #9868<span class="inline-flex"><svg data-testid="geist-icon" height="16" stroke-linejoin="round" style="width:14px;height:14px;color:currentColor" viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="16"><path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M5.75001 2H5.00001V3.5H5.75001H11.4393L2.21968 12.7197L1.68935 13.25L2.75001 14.3107L3.28034 13.7803L12.4988 4.56182V10.25V11H13.9988V10.25V3C13.9988 2.44772 13.5511 2 12.9988 2H5.75001Z" fill="currentColor"/></svg></span></a>). To use the previous Chat Completions API behavior, use <code>azure.chat()</code> instead.</p>

</span></div></div><div class="line" data-geist-code-block-line="true" id="C4edffc48-L3" data-highlighted="false" style="font-feature-settings:&quot;liga&quot; off"><button aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1" type="button" aria-label="Add line anchor to the URL" class="code-block-module__VkAzma__lineNumber">3</button><div class="token-line"><span class="token plain"></span><span class="token comment">// Now uses Responses API by default</span><span class="token plain"></span></div></div><div class="line" data-geist-code-block-line="true" id="C4edffc48-L4" data-highlighted="false" style="font-feature-settings:&quot;liga&quot; off"><button aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1" type="button" aria-label="Add line anchor to the URL" class="code-block-module__VkAzma__lineNumber">4</button><div class="token-line"><span class="token plain"></span><span class="token keyword">const</span><span class="token plain"> model </span><span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token plain"> </span><span class="token function">azure</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">&#x27;gpt-4o&#x27;</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span><span class="token plain"></span></div></div><div class="line" data-geist-code-block-line="true" id="C4edffc48-L5" data-highlighted="false" style="font-feature-settings:&quot;liga&quot; off"><button aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1" type="button" aria-label="Add line anchor to the URL" class="code-block-module__VkAzma__lineNumber">5</button><div class="token-line"><span class="token plain" style="display:inline-block">
</span></div></div><div class="line" data-geist-code-block-line="true" id="C4edffc48-L6" data-highlighted="false" style="font-feature-settings:&quot;liga&quot; off"><button aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1" type="button" aria-label="Add line anchor to the URL" class="code-block-module__VkAzma__lineNumber">6</button><div class="token-line"><span class="token plain"></span><span class="token comment">// Use azure.chat() for Chat Completions API</span><span class="token plain"></span></div></div><div class="line" data-geist-code-block-line="true" id="C4edffc48-L7" data-highlighted="false" style="font-feature-settings:&quot;liga&quot; off"><button aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1" type="button" aria-label="Add line anchor to the URL" class="code-block-module__VkAzma__lineNumber">7</button><div class="token-line"><span class="token plain"></span><span class="token keyword">const</span><span class="token plain"> chatModel </span><span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token plain"> azure</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token method function property-access">chat</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">&#x27;gpt-4o&#x27;</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span><span class="token plain"></span></div></div><div class="line" data-geist-code-block-line="true" id="C4edffc48-L8" data-highlighted="false" style="font-feature-settings:&quot;liga&quot; off"><button aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1" type="button" aria-label="Add line anchor to the URL" class="code-block-module__VkAzma__lineNumber">8</button><div class="token-line"><span class="token plain" style="display:inline-block">
</span></div></div><div class="line" data-geist-code-block-line="true" id="C4edffc48-L9" data-highlighted="false" style="font-feature-settings:&quot;liga&quot; off"><button aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1" type="button" aria-label="Add line anchor to the URL" class="code-block-module__VkAzma__lineNumber">9</button><div class="token-line"><span class="token plain"></span><span class="token comment">// Use azure.responses() explicitly for Responses API</span><span class="token plain"></span></div></div><div class="line" data-geist-code-block-line="true" id="C4edffc48-L10" data-highlighted="false" style="font-feature-settings:&quot;liga&quot; off"><button aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1" type="button" aria-label="Add line anchor to the URL" class="code-block-module__VkAzma__lineNumber">10</button><div class="token-line"><span class="token plain"></span><span class="token keyword">const</span><span class="token plain"> responsesModel </span><span class="token operator">=</span><span class="token plain"> azure</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token method function property-access">responses</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">&#x27;gpt-4o&#x27;</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></div></div></code></pre></div>
<div class="py-2"><div class="note-module__Sn_NHq__note v3-colors" data-geist-note="" data-version="v1"><div class="note-module__Sn_NHq__content" style="gap:12px"><span style="display:flex;height:16px"><svg data-testid="geist-icon" height="16" stroke-linejoin="round" style="color:currentColor" viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="16"><path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M8 14.5C11.5899 14.5 14.5 11.5899 14.5 8C14.5 4.41015 11.5899 1.5 8 1.5C4.41015 1.5 1.5 4.41015 1.5 8C1.5 11.5899 4.41015 14.5 8 14.5ZM8 16C12.4183 16 16 12.4183 16 8C16 3.58172 12.4183 0 8 0C3.58172 0 0 3.58172 0 8C0 12.4183 3.58172 16 8 16ZM6.25 7H7H7.74999C8.30227 7 8.74999 7.44772 8.74999 8V11.5V12.25H7.24999V11.5V8.5H7H6.25V7ZM8 6C8.55229 6 9 5.55228 9 5C9 4.44772 8.55229 4 8 4C7.44772 4 7 4.44772 7 5C7 5.55228 7.44772 6 8 6Z" fill="currentColor"/></svg></span><span><p>The Responses and Chat Completions APIs have different behavior and defaults.
If you depend on the Chat Completions API, switch your model instance to
<code>azure.chat()</code> and audit your configuration.</p></span></div></div></div>
<h4 id="responses-api-providermetadata-and-provideroptions-key" data-docs-heading=""><a href="#responses-api-providermetadata-and-provideroptions-key">Responses API <code>providerMetadata</code> and <code>providerOptions</code> Key<span><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" height="0.7em" width="0.7em">
  <g stroke-width="1.2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor">
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M8.995,7.005 L8.995,7.005c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975l-1.99,1.99c-1.374,1.374-3.601,1.374-4.975,0l0,0c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975 l1.748-1.698"></path>
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M7.005,8.995 L7.005,8.995c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975l1.99-1.99c1.374-1.374,3.601-1.374,4.975,0l0,0c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975 l-1.748,1.698"></path>
  </g>
</svg></span></a></h4>
<p>For the <strong>Responses API</strong>, the <code>@ai-sdk/azure</code> provider now uses <code>azure</code> as the key for <code>providerMetadata</code> and <code>providerOptions</code> instead of <code>openai</code>. The <code>openai</code> key is still supported for <code>providerOptions</code> input, but resulting <code>providerMetadata</code> output now uses <code>azure</code>.</p>

<h3 id="anthropic" data-docs-heading=""><a href="#anthropic">Anthropic<span><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" height="0.7em" width="0.7em">
  <g stroke-width="1.2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor">
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M8.995,7.005 L8.995,7.005c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975l-1.99,1.99c-1.374,1.374-3.601,1.374-4.975,0l0,0c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975 l1.748-1.698"></path>
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M7.005,8.995 L7.005,8.995c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975l1.99-1.99c1.374-1.374,3.601-1.374,4.975,0l0,0c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975 l-1.748,1.698"></path>
  </g>
</svg></span></a></h3>
<h4 id="structured-outputs-mode" data-docs-heading=""><a href="#structured-outputs-mode">Structured Outputs Mode<span><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" height="0.7em" width="0.7em">
  <g stroke-width="1.2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor">
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M8.995,7.005 L8.995,7.005c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975l-1.99,1.99c-1.374,1.374-3.601,1.374-4.975,0l0,0c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975 l1.748-1.698"></path>
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M7.005,8.995 L7.005,8.995c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975l1.99-1.99c1.374-1.374,3.601-1.374,4.975,0l0,0c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975 l-1.748,1.698"></path>
  </g>
</svg></span></a></h4>
<p>Anthropic has <a href="https://www.claude.com/blog/structured-outputs-on-the-claude-developer-platform" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow" target="_blank"> introduced native structured outputs for Claude Sonnet 4.5 and later models <span class="inline-flex"><svg data-testid="geist-icon" height="16" stroke-linejoin="round" style="width:14px;height:14px;color:currentColor" viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="16"><path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M5.75001 2H5.00001V3.5H5.75001H11.4393L2.21968 12.7197L1.68935 13.25L2.75001 14.3107L3.28034 13.7803L12.4988 4.56182V10.25V11H13.9988V10.25V3C13.9988 2.44772 13.5511 2 12.9988 2H5.75001Z" fill="currentColor"/></svg></span></a>. The <code>@ai-sdk/anthropic</code> provider now includes a <code>structuredOutputMode</code> option to control how structured outputs are generated (<a href="https://github.com/vercel/ai/pull/10502" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">PR #10502<span class="inline-flex"><svg data-testid="geist-icon" height="16" stroke-linejoin="round" style="width:14px;height:14px;color:currentColor" viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="16"><path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M5.75001 2H5.00001V3.5H5.75001H11.4393L2.21968 12.7197L1.68935 13.25L2.75001 14.3107L3.28034 13.7803L12.4988 4.56182V10.25V11H13.9988V10.25V3C13.9988 2.44772 13.5511 2 12.9988 2H5.75001Z" fill="currentColor"/></svg></span></a>).</p>
<p>The available modes are:</p>
<ul>
<li><code>&#x27;outputFormat&#x27;</code>: Use Anthropic&#x27;s native <code>output_format</code> parameter</li>
<li><code>&#x27;jsonTool&#x27;</code>: Use a special JSON tool to specify the structured output format</li>
<li><code>&#x27;auto&#x27;</code> (default): Use <code>&#x27;outputFormat&#x27;</code> when supported by the model, otherwise fall back to <code>&#x27;jsonTool&#x27;</code></li>
</ul>

<h4 id="providermetadata-and-provideroptions-key" data-docs-heading=""><a href="#providermetadata-and-provideroptions-key"><code>providerMetadata</code> and <code>providerOptions</code> Key<span><svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" height="0.7em" width="0.7em">
  <g stroke-width="1.2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor">
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M8.995,7.005 L8.995,7.005c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975l-1.99,1.99c-1.374,1.374-3.601,1.374-4.975,0l0,0c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975 l1.748-1.698"></path>
    <path fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-miterlimit="10" d="M7.005,8.995 L7.005,8.995c-1.374-1.374-1.374-3.601,0-4.975l1.99-1.99c1.374-1.374,3.601-1.374,4.975,0l0,0c1.374,1.374,1.374,3.601,0,4.975 l-1.748,1.698"></path>
  </g>
</svg></span></a></h4>
<p>The <code>@ai-sdk/google-vertex</code> provider now uses <code>vertex</code> as the key for <code>providerMetadata</code> and <code>providerOptions</code> instead of <code>google</code>. The <code>google</code> key is still supported for <code>providerOptions</code> input, but resulting <code>providerMetadata</code> output now uses <code>vertex</code>.</p>

Protect Geist code blocks from 1Password DOM flattening\n(function() {\n  const codeBlockSnapshots = new WeakMap();\n  let isRestoring = false;\n\n  function saveSnapshot(codeElement) {\n    if (!codeBlockSnapshots.has(codeElement)) {\n      codeBlockSnapshots.set(codeElement, codeElement.cloneNode(true));\n    }\n  }\n\n  function checkAndRestore(codeElement) {\n    if (isRestoring) return;\n\n    // Check if our specific structure was flattened\n    const hasOurStructure = codeElement.querySelector('[data-geist-code-block-line]');\n    const snapshot = codeBlockSnapshots.get(codeElement);\n\n    if (!hasOurStructure \u0026\u0026 snapshot \u0026\u0026 snapshot.querySelector('[data-geist-code-block-line]')) {\n      // Our structure was destroyed (likely by 1Password), restore it\n      isRestoring = true;\n      codeElement.innerHTML = snapshot.innerHTML;\n      isRestoring = false;\n    }\n  }\n\n  function initializeCodeBlocks() {\n    document.querySelectorAll('code[data-geist-code-block]').forEach(saveSnapshot);\n  }\n\n  // Single global observer for all code blocks\n  const globalObserver = new MutationObserver(function(mutations) {\n    if (isRestoring) return;\n\n    mutations.forEach(function(mutation) {\n      // Check if new code blocks were added\n      mutation.addedNodes.forEach(function(node) {\n        if (node.nodeType === 1) {\n          if (node.matches \u0026\u0026 node.matches('code[data-geist-code-block]')) {\n            saveSnapshot(node);\n          } else if (node.querySelectorAll) {\n            node.querySelectorAll('code[data-geist-code-block]').forEach(saveSnapshot);\n          }\n        }\n      });\n\n      // Check if existing code blocks were modified\n      var target = mutation.target;\n      if (target.nodeType === 1) {\n        // Check if the target itself is a protected code block\n        if (target.matches \u0026\u0026 target.matches('code[data-geist-code-block]')) {\n          checkAndRestore(target);\n        }\n        // Check if the target contains protected code blocks\n        else if (target.closest \u0026\u0026 target.closest('code[data-geist-code-block]')) {\n          checkAndRestore(target.closest('code[data-geist-code-block]'));\n        }\n      }\n    });\n  });\n\n  // Initialize existing code blocks and start observing\n  function init() {\n    initializeCodeBlocks();\n    globalObserver.observe(document.documentElement, {\n      childList: true,\n
